history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A dark mode dashboard UI for a PPOB (Payment Point Online Bank) web application. The dashboard is divided into several sections: "Dashboard," "Akun" (Account), "Transaksi" (Transactions), and "Docs" (Documentation).

The "Dashboard" section on the left displays key financial metrics: "Saldo Masuk" (Incoming Balance) of Rp 2.450.000, "Saldo Keluar" (Outgoing Balance) of Rp 1.250.000, and "Total Saldo" (Total Balance) of Rp 1.200.000. Below this are options for "Deposit" and "Tarik Saldo" (Withdraw Balance). A "Riwayat Transaksi Terbaru" (Recent Transaction History) table lists three recent transactions with columns for No., Tanggal (Date), Jenis (Type), Deskripsi (Description), Status, and Nominal.

The "Akun" section on the right displays "Informasi Akun" (Account Information), including Username "User123," a masked Password, and an API Key. A prominent "Penting" (Important) note advises users not to share their account and API key. The "Saldo Anda" (Your Balance) is shown as Rp 1.200.000.

The "Transaksi" section, also on the left, displays "Semua Riwayat Transaksi" (All Transaction History) in a table format, with filtering options for date range and transaction status. The table shows five transactions with similar columns as the recent history, plus "Saldo Akhir" (Ending Balance). Pagination controls are visible at the bottom of the transaction list.

The "Docs" section on the far right provides "Dokumentasi" (Documentation) with a list of guides: "Panduan Integrasi API" (API Integration Guide), "Daftar Endpoint" (Endpoint List), "Contoh Request" (Example Request), "Kode Error" (Error Code), and "FAQ."

The overall color palette is dominated by dark grays and blacks, with vibrant blue accents for navigation elements, buttons, and highlights. Text is primarily white or light gray for readability. The style is clean, modern, and functional, typical of web application dashboards. The lighting is even, suggesting an internal screen illumination rather than external light sources. The mood is professional and informative.
